# sccfm_service_object (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up an existing service object by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the object to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the object.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the object. This is a UUID generated by the object service.
- `overrides` (Attributes List) List of per-target overrides. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides))
- `protocol` (String) The protocol of the service object.
- `value` (String) The port value of the service object.

<a id="nestedatt--overrides"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overrides`

Read-Only:

- `protocol` (String)
- `target_id` (String)
- `value` (String)
